final:
module top_module(
  input in0,
  input in1,
  input in2,
  input in3,
  input sel0,
  input sel1,
  output out
wire __out_tmp = (sel1 == 0 && sel0 == 0) ? in0 :
               (sel1 == 0 && sel0 == 1) ? in1 :
               (sel1 == 1 && sel0 == 0) ? in2 :
               (sel1 == 1 && sel0 == 1) ? in3 :
               1'bx;
assign out = __out_tmp;

endmodule
